mapper.sql: id, code, name, type, ip, online_status, is_abnormal, exception_detail, map_code, last_online_at, last_heartbeat_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scene_device (code, name, type, ip, online_status, is_abnormal, exception_detail, map_code, last_online_at, last_heartbeat_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{type}, #{ip}, #{onlineStatus}, #{isAbnormal}, #{exceptionDetail}, #{mapCode}, #{lastOnlineAt}, #{lastHeartbeatAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
